title: Research Group Mission and Collaboration in Portugal, Austria and Finland 2012-2013
description: The data contain interview notes and transcripts of interviews of research group members in a certain field of study from three different countries; Finland, Austria and Portugal. All the interviewed research groups belonged to the same field of study, but in different organisational contexts. Some of the interviews are individual interviews and some are group interviews of 2-6 people. Themes of the interviews included goals of the research groups, their operating environments, and views on coop
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
